Appearances:
Plaintiff, Community Housing Partnership is present. Represented by David Kim.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Darro Jefferson, is present.
Attorney, Christopher Sousa , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Nancy Hudgins, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUL-19-2010 is vacated.
